reference: Hey, just don't think about any major problem. Get a chest X-ray and an electrocardiogram to rule out causes related to the lungs and heart. It will mostly be muscular pain; get some analgesic.
text: Hey, just don't think about any major problem. Get a chest X-ray and an electrocardiogram to rule out causes related to the lungs and heart. It will mostly be muscular pain. Get some analgesic.
